conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J, as our conversation flowed naturally over shared interests like books and family goals, making me feel like we were on the same wavelength. G was another strong connection, especially since we bonded over hometown memories and explicitly discussed teaming up for the game. A also stood out, with our talks about community traditions and fairs creating a warm, relatable vibe. In contrast, I felt least connected to C, as our discussion was more transactional, focusing mainly on game strategy without much personal sharing.

I did make agreements with G to team up and with C to coordinate our strategy by holding back early in the game. Going into the game, I trust J, G, and A based on our genuine conversations and shared enthusiasm, but I don't fully trust C since our interaction felt more superficial and strategy-driven.
